scientific_label: FULL TREC-CAsT DOCUMENT CORPUS / FULL MS MARCO V1 DEV.SMALL QUERY WORKLOAD / HYBRID FAISS QLR / MULTI-CONFIG CACHE-WARMED B-Q_A-Q_B POSITION-2 OBSERVATION
backend_proof: Producer python/hybrid/cachewarmed_treccast.py imports FaithfulQLR (hybrid FAISS) + src.data_loading + src.indexing.
It imports NO native_qlr / native_qlr_v2 / native_qlr_v3 module.
It reads NO NATIVE_EXPORT_DIR and NO NATIVE_MODULE_DIR.
Document search uses faiss IndexHNSWFlat.search / search_level_0 on HYBRID_DOC_INDEX.

baseline_configuration.type: ordinary hybrid FAISS IndexHNSWFlat.search (no seeding, no router, no union)
baseline_configuration.source: authoritative hybrid baseline from Benchmarks 01/05/06 (EF_DEFAULT=64) and Benchmark 07 (timed_baseline)
baseline_configuration.note: NOT Benchmark 02's native ef=50 baseline — Benchmark 02 contributes only the cache-warmed structural template.

qa_qb_configuration.s_max_source: 1.0 - Q25(ep_distances[:,0]) / 2.0  (25th percentile of squared-L2; paper 75th-percentile-of-similarity definition; computed at run time from QLR_ARTIFACT_DIR/ep_distances.npy)
qa_qb_configuration.not_optimized: Q_A and Q_B are the direct hybrid mapping of Benchmark 02's Q_A/Q_B; no parameter search, no ground-truth-based selection.

parameter_mapping_bench02_to_bench08.bench08_hybrid: compute_s_max(ep_distances[:,0], 0.25) = 1 - Q25(L2^2)/2 [same similarity quantile, L2 form]
parameter_mapping_bench02_to_bench08.verdict: SEMANTIC_EQUIVALENT (corpus metric differs: native IP vs hybrid L2 over unit vectors; both yield the 75th-percentile top-1 doc similarity)
DELIBERATE_DIFFERENCE (task requires the authoritative hybrid ef=64 baseline, NOT the native ef=50 baseline)

parameter_mapping_bench02_to_bench08.bench02_native: N=6980, warmup=300, reps=3, fixed order, [B,Q_A,Q_B] per query
parameter_mapping_bench02_to_bench08.bench08_hybrid: N=6980, warmup=300, reps=3, fixed order 0..N-1, [B,Q_A,Q_B] per query
parameter_mapping_bench02_to_bench08.source: benchmarks/02 RUN.sh + final_validate.py; adopted verbatim as the cache-warmed protocol

incompatibilities: None. Every Benchmark 02 QLR parameter has a direct hybrid equivalent in FaithfulQLR. The only intentional differences are (a) the baseline efSearch (hybrid ef=64 per task requirement, not native ef=50) and (b) the s_max metric form (L2 vs IP), both explicitly flagged above.

protocol_semantics.q_b_position: 2 (inherits Q_A cache warmth on the same query)
protocol_semantics.timing_boundary: time.perf_counter_ns() around each FAISS call (identical to Benchmark 07 timed_baseline / timed_qlr)

changed_only: PCA loaded from PCA_MODEL joblib (same asset as Benchmarks 1/5/6) instead of extracted arrays
the surrounding fixed-order B-Q_A-Q_B cache-warmed execution loop (from Benchmark 02)

caveats: Q_B is the cache-warmed position-2 observation; NOT an isolated cold-cache result.
The result is NOT automatically paper-comparable.
Latency depends on page-cache state, CPU load, NUMA placement, memory pressure, filesystem residency and CPU frequency.

This benchmark is the hybrid TREC-CAsT analogue of Benchmark 02 and must never be conflated with the native 500k Benchmark 02, the frozen fixed-ef Benchmark 01, or the fixed-ef Stage-2 grid Benchmark 06.
